description: Use Google's WASM text-to-speech voices locally through a supported browser runtime (Microsoft Edge or Google Chrome) as an NVDA synthesizer.
publisher: Nguyen Anh Duc, Dao Duc Trung and Pham Hung Vuong
changelog:
Version 0.3:
- Added browser runtime selection (Microsoft Edge or Google Chrome) directly in NVDA settings.
- Moved browser profile storage to AppData\Local for cache stability and hidden background helper windows.
- Added Filter by language dropdown and orphaned voice packages cleanup in Voice Manager.
- Fixed cut-off speech on the first utterance and reduced speech synthesis latency.
- Integrated 180 Google TTS voice packages and normalized language codes.
- Added full localization system and complete Vietnamese translation.
